data.title: TransUnion Launches TruLookup® for Real Estate, a Mobile-First Platform Helping Real Estate Professionals Work Faster, Safer and Smarter
data.description: A specialized solution is now available to real estate professionals, providing them with fraud protection, safety insights, and effective prospecting tools. This purpose-built solution offers essential features to safeguard against fraudulent activities and offers valuable insights into safety measures. Additionally, it equips professionals with tools for high-impact prospecting, enhancing their efficiency and effectiveness in their roles. This comprehensive solution caters to the specific needs of real estate professionals, ensuring a secure and productive working environment.

data.title: ReliaQuest Named to Fast Company’s Annual List of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: TAMPA, Fla.-- ReliaQuest, a renowned player in Agentic AI cybersecurity, has made it to Fast Company’s prestigious list of the World’s Most Innovative Companies for 2026. This recognition highlights businesses that are making a significant impact on various sectors through groundbreaking innovations. ReliaQuest earned its place on the list for its advancements in Agentic AI for cybersecurity, including the introduction of the cybersecurity sector’s maiden autonomous, role-specific agentic AI personas. This marks a significant step forward in the cybersecurity realm globally.

data.title: ATOM price expected to test $1.84 resistance before potential $2.10 recovery by April 2026, currently trading at $1.78.
data.description: The digital currency Cosmos (ATOM) is currently being traded at $1.78, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral 41.30. Technical analysis indicates a possible challenge at the $1.84 resistance level before a potential rebound towards the $2.10 range expected by April 2026.

data.title: BROOKDALE SENIOR LIVING RECOGNIZED AS A "BEST PET WORKPLACE"
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee on March 24, 2026, Brookdale Senior Living, the leading operator of senior living communities in the country, was recognized as a "Best Pet Workplace" by WUF World. This organization focuses on honoring the connection between humans and animals. Brookdale's acknowledgment as a top pet-friendly workplace highlights its dedication to fostering a positive environment.

data.title: AerCap Locks In Freighter Deal With Ethiopian Airlines
data.description: AerCap Holdings N.V. (NYSE: AER) experienced an increase in shares during the premarket session with the announcement of lease agreements with Ethiopian Airlines for two Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) 777-300ERSF converted freighters. These agreements are significant for AerCap as they signify the first of their kind to be utilized in Africa. The delivery of the freighters is expected in the second quarter of 2028, which will enhance Ethiopian Airlines' cargo capabilities and operational efficiency. Aercap's CEO, Aengus Kelly, expressed excitement about strengthening their collaboration with Ethiopian Airlines, highlighting the freighters' ability to provide 25% more capacity compared to smaller twin-engine models. This move is in line with Ethiopian Airlines' dedication to investing in modern, sustainable solutions to stimulate trade in the region. Additionally, AerCap recently placed an order for 100 Airbus A320neo Family aircraft, including the conversion of 45 existing options and the addition of 55 more aircraft to its order book.

data.title: Perspecta to Attend RISKWORLD 2026 and Sponsor Alliance of Women in Workers' Compensation Event
data.description: In Langhorne, Pennsylvania on March 24, 2026, Perspecta disclosed plans to participate in RISKWORLD 2026, a event by RIMS, occurring in Philadelphia between May 3-6. Alongside its attendance, Perspecta will be sponsoring activities on May 3.

data.title: PrimeXBT receives 'Best Trading Conditions' and 'Best Forex & CFD Broker' awards for Asia
data.description: In Castries, Saint Lucia, on March 24, 2026, PrimeXBT, a renowned global broker and crypto service provider, clinched two prestigious awards at the 2026 World Business Outlook Awards. The accolades included Best Trading Conditions in Asia and Best Forex & CFD Broker in Asia. This recognition highlights PrimeXBT's exceptional performance and standing in the industry, solidifying its position as a top player in the market.

data.title: Brunswick Corporation Named to Fast Company’s Annual List of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: Brunswick Corporation, a leading company in marine technology and listed on the NYSE as BC, was recently recognized by Fast Company as one of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026. This acknowledgment highlights businesses that are influential in industry and culture with their innovations.

data.title: Mobilicom Terminates its ATM Facility, Citing Strengthened Financial Position
data.description: On March 24, 2026, based in Palo Alto, California, Mobilicom Limited (Nasdaq: MOB, MOBBW) declared the termination of its at-the-market sales agreement established in February 2025. Mobilicom, a company specializing in cybersecurity and durable solutions for drones and robotics, made this announcement regarding the cessation of the ATM agreement.

data.title: 7-Eleven, Inc. Kicks Off a Major Chicken Takeover with Sandwiches, Wings and Big Deals
data.description: 7-Eleven, Inc., based in Irving, Texas, announced on March 24, 2026, a new menu featuring a variety of crispy sandwiches, flavorful wings, and combo meals. As the leading convenience store globally, the company is emphasizing a chicken-centric menu. The assortment includes crispy chicken sandwiches and saucy wings. This rollout coincides with the company's campaign to offer a wide range of delicious yet affordable options to customers.

data.title: Hail Now a Leading Driver of Insured Losses, on Par With Major Hurricanes - New Cotality Report Finds
data.description: A report by Cotality reveals that the risk of hailstorms in the United States now matches that of major hurricanes in terms of property damage. Approximately 43.5 million properties in the U.S. with a value of $17.84 trillion in Reconstruction Cost Value (RCV) are at risk of being impacted by destructive hailstorms, according to the findings.

data.title: AECOM selected to continue advancing San Diego Unified School District’s capital bond programs
data.description: A global infrastructure leader, AECOM (NYSE:ACM), has been chosen by the San Diego Unified School District (SDUSD) to remain its prime consultant, offering additional support services for the District’s capital bond programs. This decision further solidifies the enduring partnership between AECOM and SDUSD, focusing on creating innovative learning spaces and expanding possibilities for San Diego’s increasing student body. The agreement signifies AECOM's commitment to enhancing educational facilities and comes after years of collaboration with SDUSD.

data.title: King Energy Named to Fast Company's Annual List of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: DURANGO, Colo., March 24, 2026 - King Energy has achieved a new milestone by being included in Fast Company's esteemed list of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026, along with industry giants like Google, Nvidia, Adidas, Walmart, and others. This recognition highlights King Energy's dedication to innovation and excellence in its field. The company's innovative strategies have earned it a place among the leading global companies making a significant impact this year.

data.title: DelphX Provides Strategic Update on Bitcoin Initiative and Institutional Financing Progress
data.description: In Toronto, Canada on March 24, 2026, DelphX Capital Markets Inc. (TSXV: DELX) (OTCQB: DLPXF) shared progress on its Bitcoin treasury strategy and institutional financing efforts. The Company is pleased to update the public on the development of these initiatives.
